title: Trade with China and Impacts on North American Wages

summary.about: How China’s trade growth affects the wage gap between skilled and unskilled workers in North America.
summary.audience: Labor and trade policymakers, economists and inequality researchers.
summary.method: Builds on trade and labor-supply theory to model China’s growth, imports, migration and skill-premium effects.
summary.insights: Trade is one of several forces shaping wage inequality, alongside migration, education and skill-biased technological change.
